title: Smoky Mediterranean Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with smoky spices, fresh vegetables, and nutty pilaf.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the smoky paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the rice pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the diced tomatoes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a serving bowl and top with crumbled feta cheese and chopped parsley, if using.
